---
title: "Theory Reading Track"
---

## If Your Goal Is Heavy Theory Papers

This is the shortest high-value route:

1. proofs
2. linear algebra
3. multivariable calculus
4. probability
5. statistics
6. real analysis
7. optimization
8. matrix analysis
9. learning theory
10. high-dimensional probability
11. high-dimensional statistics

## Overlay

Run the `paper lab` in parallel. Do not wait until you feel fully ready before touching papers.
